title: MappingSettings
description: MappingSettings: An entity holding information about the enforced convert relationships between Revit families and BHoM types on Pull as well as mapping between Revit parameters and BHoM object properties on Push/Pull.

ParameterMaps.description: A collection of entities defining relationships between property names of BHoM types (or RevitParameters attached to objects of these types) and parameter names of correspondent Revit elements.

FamilyMaps.description: A collection of entities defining relationships between Revit families and BHoM types, to which these families are meant to be converted on Pull.

TagsParameter.description: Name of the Revit parameter to be used as a source (on Pull) and target (on Push) of information for BHoM tags.

MaterialGradeParameter.description: Name of the Revit parameter to be used as a source of information about material grade of a Revit element.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
